title: To the Moon and Back
why_this_song: To the Moon and Back by Savage Garden (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "If you'll be, if you'll be my baby"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "She's taking her time making up the reasons"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "If you'll be, if you'll be my baby"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: ""Mama never loved her much"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "She's saying:"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: "And I would fly you to the moon and back
If you'll be, if you'll be my baby
Got a ticket for a world where we belong
And daddy never keeps in touch

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "baby" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "baby" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "she's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "she's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She's taking her time making up the reasons
All her friends they've been tried for treason

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "To the Moon and Back" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "To the Moon and Back" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "To the Moon and Back" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "To the Moon and Back"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Savage Garden one question about "To the Moon and Back", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Savage Garden sobre "To the Moon and Back", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
